sn24.15:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, when what exists, by clinging to what, by adhering to what, does such a view as this arise: ‘The Tathāgata exists after death’?"
sn24.15:1.2: "Venerable sir, our teachings are rooted in the Blessed One … ."
sn24.15:1.3: "When, bhikkhus, a noble disciple … with enlightenment as his destination."
